title: Let The Seeds Drop
body:
Simply adds a drops of vanilla seeds from grass.
The chance of a drop depends of biome where grass was break.

Potato - **higher drop chance in Meadow, Plains and Forest**

Carrot - **higher drop chance in Meadow, Plains and Forest**

Melon seeds - **higher drop chance in Jungle biomes**

Pumpkin seeds - **higher drop chance in Meadow and Birch forest**

Inspired by Pam's Get all the Seeds Mod
